description: 极简等宽 - 纯黑白 + 等宽字,偏工程师审美,适合技术 / 工程 / 开发类长文

styles.body: font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', 'Menlo', -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Helvetica Neue', 'PingFang SC', 'Microsoft YaHei', sans-serif; font-size: 15px; color: #1a1a1a; line-height: 1.8; letter-spacing: 0.3px; word-spacing: 1px; padding: 28px 36px; background: #ffffff;
styles.h1: font-size: 22px; font-weight: 800; color: #000000; text-align: left; margin: 36px 0 18px; padding: 0 0 10px 0; border-bottom: 3px solid #000000; line-height: 1.35;
styles.h2: font-size: 17px; font-weight: 800; color: #000000; margin: 36px 0 16px; padding: 0; line-height: 1.5; letter-spacing: 0.3px;
styles.h3: font-size: 14.5px; font-weight: 700; color: #1a1a1a; margin: 26px 0 12px; padding: 0; text-transform: none; letter-spacing: 0.2px;
styles.p: margin: 16px 0; text-indent: 0; text-align: justify; color: #1a1a1a; line-height: 1.85;
styles.blockquote: margin: 24px 0; padding: 14px 20px; background: #f5f5f5; border-left: 3px solid #000000; color: #2a2a2a; font-size: 14px; border-radius: 0; line-height: 1.8;
styles.img: max-width: 100%; height: auto; border-radius: 2px; margin: 22px auto; display: block; border: 1px solid #e5e5e5;
styles.code_inline: background: #efefef; color: #c7254e; padding: 2px 6px; border-radius: 2px; font-size: 13px; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', 'Menlo', 'Consolas', monospace;
styles.code_block: background: #0d0d0d; color: #e5e5e5; padding: 16px 18px; border-radius: 4px; font-size: 12.5px; line-height: 1.65; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', 'Menlo', 'Consolas', monospace; overflow-x: auto; white-space: pre; margin: 22px 0; border: 1px solid #222; -webkit-overflow-scrolling: touch; -moz-tab-size: 2; tab-size: 2; font-variant-ligatures: none; -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
styles.ol: margin: 18px 0; padding-left: 0; list-style: none; counter-reset: list;
styles.li_bullet: color: #000000; font-weight: 800; font-size: 13px; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; display: inline-block; min-width: 16px; margin-right: 8px; text-align: left;
styles.li_number: color: #000000; font-weight: 700; font-size: 13px; min-width: 22px; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; display: inline-block; margin-right: 10px;
styles.hr: border: none; height: 1px; background: #000000; margin: 38px 0; opacity: 0.2;
styles.table: width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; margin: 22px 0; font-size: 13px; border: 1px solid #000000; table-layout: fixed; word-break: break-word;
styles.th: background: #000000; color: #ffffff; padding: 10px 12px; text-align: left; font-weight: 700; font-size: 12.5px; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; word-break: break-word; line-height: 1.5;
styles.td: padding: 10px 8px; border-bottom: 1px solid #e5e5e5; color: #1a1a1a; font-size: 13px; word-break: break-word; line-height: 1.55;
styles.caption: font-size: 12px; color: #888; text-align: center; margin-top: 10px; letter-spacing: 0.3px;
styles.section_divider: text-align: center; color: #000000; letter-spacing: 14px; font-size: 11px; margin: 34px 0; user-select: none; opacity: 0.4; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace;

list_style.label: A · 等宽方括号
list_style.num_container: display: inline-block; color: #0a0a0a; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas',monospace; font-weight: 700; font-size: 13px; margin-right: 10px;
list_style.bullet_container: display: inline-block; color: #0a0a0a; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono','Menlo',monospace; font-weight: 700; font-size: 13px; margin-right: 10px;
